name: Atta Dosa Recipe | Whole Wheat Dosa (Godhuma Dosa)

ingredients.name: shallots
ingredients.notes: sliced or ¼ cup chopped onions

steps.instruction: Mix whole wheat flour and rice flour in a bowl.
Add sliced shallots/onions, curry leaves, ginger, cumin seeds, asafoetida and salt.
Add water gradually to make thin flowing batter. Break any lumps.
Add lemon juice and mix well. Rest covered for 30 minutes.
Mix batter again. Heat tawa, grease lightly.
Pour batter from edges to center. Fill gaps if needed.
Drizzle oil on top and sides. Cook on medium heat till base is golden and crisp.
Flip and cook the other side till crisp with golden spots. Fold and serve hot.

tips: Make batter thin and flowing for crisp texture.
Tawa must be hot before pouring.
Pour from some height for net effect.
Wheat dosa takes longer to cook than regular dosa.
Stir batter well before each dosa as flours settle.
Use well-seasoned cast iron tawa to prevent sticking.
variations: Replace rice flour with gram flour (besan).
Add grated coconut and chopped coriander leaves.
